comment: Every camera the owner has ever reviewed water from, as (player, crosshair) pairs straight off his F3 overlays, plus structural views. After ANY water change: for each entry, ReviewCam.pose(player) -> wait for chunks -> ReviewCam.shoot(player, crosshair, out.png) (or place the camera manually for the cam/look entries) and REVIEW EVERY FRAME before returning. Artifacts only show from specific angle classes: plunge-side, above/behind-crest, crest-standing, and bank-side each fail independently.

vantages.name: r9-A fall corner vs pool corner (aimed at the west lip)
r9-B west flank skirt + fall base
r10-A surface-skimming crest + see-under side gap
r10-B grazing weir seam + fall base blend
